title: NVD Pipeline Parameters
description: Parameters for the Novel Virus Detection (NVD) metagenomics pipeline. Use with Nextflow's -params-file option or register as a preset with nvd preset register.

labkey.description: Enable LabKey integration for result uploads. When enabled, all labkey_* params must be set.

labkey_blast_meta_hits_list.description: LabKey list name for BLAST meta hits

labkey_blast_fasta_list.description: LabKey list name for BLAST FASTA uploads

labkey_exp_id_guard_list.description: LabKey list name for experiment ID guard (prevents duplicate uploads)

samplesheet.description: Path to samplesheet CSV with columns: sample_id, srr, platform, fastq1, fastq2

experiment_id.description: Experiment identifier for tracking and LabKey integration

max_concurrent_downloads.description: Maximum number of concurrent SRA downloads

cleanup.description: Whether to empty the work directory after successful completion

work_dir.description: Nextflow work directory for intermediate files

experimental.description: Enable experimental release-candidate features that may change or be removed.

nvd_files.description: Path to NVD resource files directory

virus_index.description: Path to a prebuilt vertebrate-infecting virus deacon index (.idx file). Providing this enables virus read enrichment.

virus_index_url.description: URL to download a prebuilt vertebrate-infecting virus deacon index. Providing this enables virus read enrichment when virus_index is not set.

virus_reference_fasta.description: Custom vertebrate-infecting virus FASTA to build and union with other virus indexes. Providing this enables virus read enrichment.

virus_kmer_size.description: K-mer size for building a custom virus enrichment index

virus_window_size.description: Minimizer window size for building a custom virus enrichment index

virus_abs_threshold.description: Minimum absolute minimizer hits for virus read enrichment

virus_rel_threshold.description: Minimum relative proportion of minimizers for virus read enrichment (0.0-1.0)

preprocess.description: Enable default preprocessing steps before classification

dedup.description: Deduplicate sequencing reads (umbrella: enables both dedup_seq and dedup_pos)

dedup_pos.description: Positional deduplication with samtools markdup (after alignment)

filter_reads.description: Apply quality and length filtering to reads

min_read_quality_illumina.description: Minimum average quality score for Illumina reads

min_read_quality_nanopore.description: Minimum average quality score for Nanopore reads

max_read_length.description: Maximum read length to retain (no limit if not specified)

host_index.description: Path to a prebuilt host/contaminant index (.idx file). Providing this enables host depletion.

host_index_url.description: URL to download a prebuilt host/contaminant index. Providing this enables host depletion when host_index is not set.

host_contaminants_fasta.description: Custom contaminant FASTA to build and union with other host indexes. Providing this enables host depletion.

host_kmer_size.description: K-mer size for building a custom host/contaminant index

host_window_size.description: Minimizer window size for building a custom host/contaminant index

host_abs_threshold.description: Minimum absolute minimizer hits to classify as contaminant

cutoff_percent.description: Minimum abundance threshold for reporting taxa (0-1)

entropy.description: Entropy threshold for sequence complexity filtering (0-1)

min_consecutive_bases.description: Minimum number of consecutive bases required

include_children.description: Include child taxa in taxonomic analysis

human_virus_families.description: List of virus family names to include in human virus analysis

max_blast_targets.description: Maximum number of BLAST hits to consider before calling hits

blast_retention_count.description: Number of top BLAST hits to retain

refman_registry.description: Path to refman registry file for reference management

monoimage.description: Container image to use for pipeline execution

slack_enabled.description: Enable Slack notifications for run completion

taxonomy_dir.description: Explicit taxonomy database directory containing NCBI taxdump files. When unset, Python taxonomy helpers resolve the cache location.
